Why I Own It
MELI has built irreplaceable financial infrastructure for 650 million Latin Americans, becoming the backbone for underbanked populations. The ecosystem stickiness from payments, credit, and logistics creates switching costs that pure marketplaces can't match. Trading at 7x free cash flow despite multi-decade digital transformation runway.
Moat
Strong network effects and scale economies create genuine competitive barriers

Four consecutive quarters of earnings misses suggest structural issues
